data.definition: High blood pressure without a known secondary cause.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Linked to chronic stress; can lead to health-related anxiety.

data.definition: A type of chest pain caused by reduced blood flow to the heart.
Chest pain due to reduced blood flow to the heart.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Cardiac anxiety and fear of physical exertion.

data.definition: Heart attack; sudden blockage of blood flow to the heart muscle.
Heart attack; blockage of blood flow to the heart muscle.
data.mentalHealthImpact: High risk of PTSD and post-MI depression.

data.definition: Hardening and narrowing of the arteries.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Lifestyle frustration and chronic illness adjustment disorder.

data.definition: Heart cannot pump enough blood to meet body's needs.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Depression due to reduced mobility and chronic fatigue.

data.definition: Irregular, often rapid heart rate.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Panic-like symptoms during palpitations.

data.definition: Stroke caused by a blood clot in the brain.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Emotional lability, frustration, and depression.

data.definition: Chronic inflammatory lung disease that causes obstructed airflow.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Anxiety related to breathlessness (dyspnea).

data.definition: Airways become inflamed, narrow and swell.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Fear of sudden attacks; anxiety in environmental triggers.

data.definition: Infection that inflames air sacs in one or both lungs.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Lethargy and temporary cognitive clouding.

data.definition: Metabolic disorder characterized by high blood sugar.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Diabetes burnout and diet-related anxiety.

data.definition: Underactive thyroid gland.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Depressive mood, brain fog, and slowed cognition.

data.definition: Excessive body fat that increases health risks.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Low self-esteem, social anxiety, and weight-stigma.

data.definition: Persistent feeling of sadness and loss of interest.
data.physicalHealthImpact: Chronic pain, fatigue, and sleep disturbances.

data.definition: Excessive, irrational worry about daily life.
Condition triggered by experiencing a traumatic event.
data.physicalHealthImpact: Chronic 'fight or flight' strain on cardiovascular system.

data.definition: Pattern of unwanted thoughts and fears (obsessions) that lead to repetitive behaviors (compulsions).
data.physicalHealthImpact: Skin issues (from washing), chronic stress exhaustion.

data.definition: Chronic condition including attention difficulty, hyperactivity, and impulsiveness.
data.physicalHealthImpact: Sleep disruption and increased risk of physical injury.

data.definition: Common sleep disorder that can make it hard to fall asleep or stay asleep.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Irritability, anxiety, and increased risk of depression.

data.definition: Acid reflux; stomach acid flows back into the esophagus.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Sleep disruption and anxiety regarding food choices.

data.definition: Common disorder that affects the large intestine.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Strong correlation with anxiety and 'Gut-Brain' axis dysfunction.

data.definition: Pain in the lower back region.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Chronic pain leads to depression and fear of movement.

data.definition: Widespread musculoskeletal pain accompanied by fatigue and sleep issues.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Depression, anxiety, and 'fibro-fog' (cognitive issues).

data.definition: Gradual loss of kidney function over time.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Fear of dialysis and lifestyle constraints.

data.definition: Eczema; condition that makes your skin red and itchy.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Social anxiety and self-consciousness regarding appearance.

data.definition: Nearsightedness.
Age-related loss of near focus.
Pain in any region of the head.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Anxiety regarding underlying causes.

data.definition: Feeling of overtiredness, low energy, or exhaustion.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Leads to reduced social interaction and low mood.

data.definition: Cancer that forms in the cells of the breasts.
data.mentalHealthImpact: High psychological distress, body image issues, and fear of recurrence.

data.displayName: Malignant neoplasm of bronchus and lung
data.definition: Cancer that begins in the lungs and may spread to other parts of the body.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Strong correlation with smoking-related guilt and high mortality anxiety.

data.definition: Progressive disease that destroys memory and other important mental functions.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Severe anxiety in early stages; caregiver burnout is a critical holistic factor.

data.definition: A disease in which the immune system eats away at the protective covering of nerves.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Unpredictability of flare-ups leads to chronic uncertainty and depression.

data.definition: Common cold; infection of the nose and throat.
data.mentalHealthImpact: In children, causes irritability and sleep disruption for both child and caregiver.

data.displayName: Morbid (severe) obesity due to excess calories
data.definition: Severe obesity that interferes with basic physical functions.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Social isolation and severe clinical depression are common.

data.definition: Developmental disorder that affects communication and behavior.
data.physicalHealthImpact: Commonly associated with GI issues and sensory processing sensitivities.
